name: Savory Cheddar Sandwiches
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the shredded cheese in a bowl and set aside.
2. Hard cook and chop the egg, then set aside.
3. Melt butter in a skillet over low heat.
4. Add onion to the skillet and cook until transparent.
5. Stir in flour and cook until well blended.
6. Heat mixture until bubbly, then add cream, salt, and Tobasco sauce gradually while stirring constantly.
7. Cook until the mixture boils. Continue cooking 1-2 minutes longer, then remove from heat.
8. Stir in lemon juice.
9. Mix cheese, egg, pimento, and stuffed olive slices into the creamy mixture until well blended.
10. Pan broil bacon slices until partially cooked but still limp.
11. Spread softened butter on bread. Layer cheese mixture on each slice (allowing about 1/4 cup per slice).
12. Top with two diagonal pieces of bacon.
13. Place sandwiches in oven set to broil (500°F or higher). Broil, keeping tops 3 inches from heat source, until cheese is bubbly and lightly browned and bacon is crisp.
14. Serve hot. Makes 6 open-faced sandwiches.
